name: FASTQ Checksum
description: Generate MD5 checksums for linked single-end or paired-end FASTQ files

inputs.name: Linked FASTQ files
inputs.description: FASTQ files already linked to order samples
inputs.sourceDescription: Read records linked to selected order samples

outputs.name: Per-sample checksum metadata
outputs.description: Per-sample checksum JSON used to update canonical read fields
outputs.destinationDescription: Writes checksum values back to linked read records

outputs.name: Checksum summary
outputs.destinationDescription: Stored as a run artifact for provenance and download

steps.name: Calculate Checksums
steps.description: Run md5sum over each linked FASTQ file
